image_purpose: W14.1 sidecar runtime: clones an operator workspace, installs JS deps, and runs the project's dev/SSR server (Vite for SPAs, Bun for Nuxt SSR, generic pnpm dev for everything else). Backend wires this image via POST /web-sandbox/preview (W14.2).

exposed_port_purpose.3000: Nuxt SSR / Next.js dev server default

node.purpose: JavaScript runtime; Node 22 is in active LTS.

pnpm.purpose: Canonical package manager for the OmniSight scaffolds (W6/W7/W8); shipped via corepack so the version is reproducible per image.

bun.purpose: Faster JS runtime used as the Nuxt SSR target inside the sandbox; Bun pre-built binaries are glibc-only, so the base image is bookworm-slim instead of alpine.

vite.purpose: Dev/build tool for the SPA scaffolds; installed globally so the sidecar can `vite --help` even before the project's own deps land.

notes: This image owns runtime tools only. Cloning the workspace, running `pnpm install`, choosing the dev command, and resource-limiting the container are the responsibility of the backend launcher (W14.2 / W14.9).
DOCKER_HOST is intentionally NOT set; the sidecar never talks to the docker daemon. The backend launches it via docker-socket-proxy from the host side.
Idle-timeout enforcement (W14.5) is owned by the backend's preview-instance reaper — the sidecar itself runs until killed.
The image does NOT bake any project source. The backend bind-mounts the workspace into /workspace at runtime.
